mapper.select: SELECT member_seq AS memberSeq, point_balance AS pointBalance, iron_qty AS ironQty, silver_qty AS silverQty, gold_qty AS goldQty, diamond_qty AS diamondQty FROM member_wallet WHERE member_seq = #{memberSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_wallet (member_seq, point_balance, iron_qty, silver_qty, gold_qty, diamond_qty, modify_dt) VALUES (#{memberSeq}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE member_wallet SET point_balance = point_balance + #{delta}, modify_dt = NOW() WHERE member_seq = #{memberSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_wallet_ledger WHERE member_seq = #{memberSeq}

SELECT ledger_seq AS ledgerSeq, member_seq AS memberSeq, reason_code AS reasonCode, summary, point_delta AS pointDelta, iron_delta AS ironDelta, silver_delta AS silverDelta, gold_delta AS goldDelta, diamond_delta AS diamondDelta, DATE_FORMAT(create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt FROM member_wallet_ledger WHERE member_seq = #{memberSeq} ORDER BY ledger_seq DESC LIMIT #{safeSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT m.MEMBER_SEQ AS memberSeq, m.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(m.NICKNAME), ''), m.MEMBER_NAME) AS memberName, COALESCE(SUM(l.point_delta), 0) AS pointsEarned FROM member_wallet_ledger l INNER JOIN MEMBER m ON m.MEMBER_SEQ = l.member_seq AND m.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE l.point_delta > 0 AND l.create_dt >= #{fromInclusive} AND l.create_dt < #{toExclusive} AND l.reason_code NOT IN ('POINT_GIFT_SENT', 'POINT_GIFT_RECEIVED') GROUP BY m.MEMBER_SEQ, m.MEMBER_ID, m.MEMBER_NAME, m.NICKNAME HAVING SUM(l.point_delta) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(l.point_delta) DESC, m.MEMBER_SEQ ASC LIMIT 100
